LanguageData.Gun_BlasterTurret.label: blaster turret gun
LanguageData.Gun_BlasterTurret.description: Charge blaster attached to a turret mount.
LanguageData.Gun_BlasterTurret.verbs.0.label: ㅤ

LanguageData.Gun_HeavyTurret.description: High caliber gun on a turret mount.

LanguageData.Gun_MediumTurret.description: Full powered cartridge gun on a turret mount.

LanguageData.Gun_AutocannonTurret.label: autocannon turret
LanguageData.Gun_AutocannonTurret.description: An automated heavy machine gun designed to be mounted on a turret, effective against infantry and light vehicles.
LanguageData.Gun_AutocannonTurret.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
LanguageData.Gun_TurretSniper.label: flak turret
LanguageData.Gun_TurretSniper.description: A self-loading heavy autocannon designed to attach to a turret.
LanguageData.Gun_TurretSniper.verbs.0.label: ㅤ

LanguageData.Gun_KPV.description: Heavy machine gun for use against light vehicles.

LanguageData.Gun_FlakTurret.description: 90mm Flak cannon on a stationary emplacement.
